articles.author: Ellen Nakashima, John Hudson, Adam Taylor
articles.title: Rubio tries to enlist other nations in antifa fight, but some allies recoil - The Washington Post
articles.description: The secretary of state plans to convene foreign ministers in Washington next week. The event has unsettled some U.S. and European officials.
articles.content: Secretary of State Marco Rubio has invited senior ministers from more than 60 countries to a meeting next week about what the Trump administration views as a major peril: the resurgence of transnatio… [+78 chars]
